counters.description: she is extremely hard to fight. her e just counter your engage and her r can counter your r. so better ban her than let her have a free win for you, especially when she just got a buff.
apc bot lane just a bad game for nilah.
apc bot lane just a bad game for nilah.
apc bot lane just a bad game for nilah.
her range is something that nilah is struggling. and her e can slow you and push her far away from you can be a little bit annoying. try to catch with your engage support.
he is strong in early game. but play carefully and he will be a walking meat for you.
this matchup is easy to hard to deal with. but in teamfight, make sure not to let her alone or her passive can make everything harder.
a good kai'sa will be a little bit hard to deal with. try to catch her with your support. when she's behind, she can't be a threat anymore.

her mobility and her e make nilah a little bit struggle to fight. you can try to kill her before 6. but after that, it's gonna be hard. match with a hard cc support will make this easier to catch her.

kalista is one of the strongest early champion. you can block some of her attack but her damage output early is still too high. try to play safe early and wait for gank. nilah can't outdamage her early.
high range, hit hard, but not too mobility. based on support to win, or lose.
ap bot lane is just bad for nilah.
ap bot. can all of you get out of bot lane?

synergies.description: nope. ap damage support is not good for nilah.
blitzcrank is okay if he can hook perfectly.
a tank support that can protect and follow you very well and have hard cc.
nope. ap damage support is not good for nilah.
bard passive makes him to leave land. and nilah passive needs someone at land to gain bonus xp. so likely a no-no. can be useful when laning phase is ended but still not viable.
ashe support is not good. bring her to adc instead, pls.
janna skill is almost for disengage. meanwhile, nilah wants enemy to engage her instead. however, she is still strong when go with nilah.
technically, she has shield, damage, cc, which nilah wants to have from a support.
an enchanter is always good for nilah when laning. lulu can solve some problems at your lane.
she has cc and bonus damage, and that is what she got. if nilah is focus instead, she can't do anything to help nilah.
some people may think lux support is not good. but i love pairing with a good lux.
this bot lane is gonna be healing and shielding machine. nilah passive with milio will give you unstoppable joy.
she can be good but not really good for nilah. her e is what nilah really need. in higher elo, bad morgana will destroy your lane easily. (i hate to pair with her although she is still okay)
water and water, good as always.
good for combat. nothing else. 'cause she is a strong tomato.
champion with hook can be good with nilah. his cc is hard cc, so it will be very good for nilah to slap them.
sometimes i see poppy support. and this pair can burst enemy bot lane very quick. she can counter dash champion and make chaos for enemy with her r.
besides damage and roaming ability, nilah has no synergy with pantheon.
one of the best engage support for nilah, besides taric.
good pair. double r = double vortex (xd).
can be good sometimes. i don't see her usually so i don't know too much. (flop pair lol)
she is like sona but she prefers ap than enchanter.
scale + scale = win in late game.
scale + scale = win for late.
moving ambulance.
although i hate him, but he is too strong for bot lane sometimes. lol
one of the best engage/enchanter support for nilah, besides rakan/sona.
nice. but not nice when hook air.
nope. ap damage support is not good for nilah.
pair with her, you must accept that your lane is gonna be harass. but if you can scale for late game or can win lane by calling gank, both of you is gonna be unstoppable.
play aggresive for win - win duo. healing synergy is a little bit annoy because of the sound.
is okay. high aggressive, can trap enemy.
viable, fast leveling. provide mobility and cc for nilah, and a free ga.
can be nice. don't know what to say. devil + devil = viable.
nilah is melee, so she can proc sejuani's passive easily. this weird pair is strong by somehow.
